overall.description: First-person horseback gameplay from Red Dead Redemption 2, beginning in an industrial district of Saint Denis with brick warehouses and railway infrastructure, transitioning through rural countryside, and ending in a swampy bayou area. The journey progresses from urban industrial architecture across a metal truss bridge into natural wilderness with wooden boardwalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial district with electric company building

events.description: begins riding horse forward from stationary position in industrial area
approaching the Saint Denis city gate archway

agents.ego_description: riding a horse through muddy cobblestone streets of the industrial district, approaching the city gate

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking along the fence line
horse-drawn carriage moving away from camera

entered.detail: large white industrial building with company signage on the roof
ornate metal archway with 'SAINT DENIS' lettering spanning the road
black iron fence running along the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in an industrial district with the Lackawanna Electric Company building dominating the view. The camera moves forward on horseback through muddy cobblestone streets, passing pedestrians and a horse carriage, approaching the ornate Saint Denis archway that marks the city entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: railway district with freight depots and tracks

events.description: passes under the Saint Denis arch gate into the open railway district

agents.ego_description: galloping past the Saint Denis gate and continuing alongside railway tracks through the industrial zone

notable_agents.action: worker standing near the fence watching the horse pass

entered.detail: parallel train tracks running alongside the dirt road with gravel beds
long low industrial building with loading docks and signage
red brick industrial building with large windows and loading bays

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the Saint Denis gate, the scene opens into a wide railway district with parallel tracks running alongside the path. The camera rides past brick warehouses and freight depots while workers and sparse pedestrians move about the industrial area.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor with brick warehouses and smokestacks

events.description: approaches railroad crossing with signal lights visible

agents.ego_description: riding parallel to railway tracks past industrial buildings with smokestacks, approaching a railroad crossing

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving ahead on the same path

entered.detail: large brick industrial building with two tall smokestacks emitting black smoke
signal lights and crossing gate mechanism beside the tracks
steel truss bridge visible in the distance spanning the river

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the industrial corridor with railway tracks to the left and brick warehouses to the right. A large building with prominent smokestacks dominates the center view as the path approaches a railroad crossing and a distant metal bridge.

events.description: enters the metal truss bridge structure, changing from dirt to wooden planks
passes a horse-drawn carriage coming from the opposite direction on the bridge

agents.ego_description: crossing a metal truss bridge over water, navigating around an oncoming carriage

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage traveling in the opposite direction across the bridge

entered.detail: blue steel truss bridge with wooden plank decking and metal railings
calm water visible beneath the bridge on both sides

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions onto a metal truss bridge with wooden decking, enclosing the view in steel girders while water passes beneath. The camera rides across, passing an oncoming horse carriage, with the industrial district falling away behind.

events.description: exits the bridge into open countryside with grasslands and fencing

agents.ego_description: riding through open grassland alongside white wooden fences, passing scattered trees

notable_agents.action: distant horse carriage moving along the path ahead

entered.detail: white-painted wooden rail fence running along the right side of the path
open green pasture with tall grass and wildflowers
large oak trees with green foliage dotting the landscape

segments.scene_description: Exiting the bridge, the environment opens into rural countryside with white wooden fences lining a dirt path through green grasslands. The camera rides past scattered oak trees and open meadows, leaving the industrial area completely behind.

events.description: enters dense forested swamp area with wooden plank pathways
ground surface changes to wooden planks over marsh water as path enters deep swamp

agents.ego_description: navigating a narrow wooden plank path through dense swamp forest with cypress trees

entered.detail: elevated wooden boardwalk planks over the swamp water
tall cypress trees with spanish moss hanging from branches
stagnant marsh water with aquatic vegetation on both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a dense bayou swamp with cypress trees and spanish moss. The camera rides along an elevated wooden plank path over marsh water, surrounded by thick vegetation and dappled sunlight filtering through the canopy.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an urban industrial district that gradually transitions from a crowded city entrance into a sprawling railway corridor. It begins on horseback moving through muddy cobblestone streets past pedestrians and a horse carriage, with the Lackawanna Electric Company building dominating the view as the camera approaches the ornate Saint Denis archway. As the camera passes through the city gate, the scene opens into a wide railway district where parallel tracks run alongside the path and brick warehouses and freight depots line the route. The movement then continues along this industrial corridor, passing workers and sparse pedestrians before the view shifts toward a large building with prominent smokestacks. The shot finally advances toward a railroad crossing and a distant metal bridge, leaving the denser city center behind.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a structured industrial crossing into an open rural landscape and finally into a dense, humid swamp. It begins by riding across a metal truss bridge with wooden decking, where steel girders frame the view as a horse carriage passes and the city fades into the distance. As the camera exits the bridge, the environment opens into a bright countryside of green grasslands and dirt paths lined with white wooden fences and scattered oak trees. The scene then shifts from the open meadows into a thick bayou, where the terrain transforms into a marshy wilderness of cypress trees and hanging Spanish moss. Finally, the camera follows an elevated wooden plank path over the water, moving through dense vegetation under dappled sunlight filtering through the canopy.
